definitions: A skilled tradesperson who has completed an apprenticeship and is qualified to install, maintain, diagnose, and repair machinery in factories and other industrial settings.
An experienced millwright who works independently and often supervises apprentices.
examples: The Journeyman Millwright quickly identified the issue with the conveyor belt.
Many Journeyman Millwrights are in high demand.
He aspired to become a Journeyman Millwright.
